title: Phase 19 Daily Run Rules V2 — Safety-Gated
principle: No SEO action happens until all safety gates pass. GSC data freshness is the first and most critical gate.

safety_gates.check: Run scripts/gsc-daily-pipeline.py (V2, dynamic dates). Verify freshness != STALE_*.
safety_gates.block_action: Save emergency report. Mark work_status=blocked_gsc_stale. Do not proceed.

safety_gates.check: Run all 7 staleness checks. All must PASS.
safety_gates.block_action: No SEO changes. No deploy. Create blocker report.

safety_gates.check: Verify real-page-focus-rule.json is loaded. Confirm today's targets are priorities 1-4 (real pages).
safety_gates.block_action: Redirect all actions to real pages only.

safety_gates.check: Verify thin-tool-scenario-optimization-freeze.json is loaded. Confirm NO tool/scenario variant improvements planned.
safety_gates.block_action: Remove any tool/scenario variant optimization from today's queue.

safety_gates.check: Verify target pages are not in cooldown (48h since last edit).
safety_gates.block_action: Skip pages in cooldown. Target next eligible real page.

post_gate_workflow: Identify real pages (priorities 1-4) with highest click potential
Select up to 5 CTR fixes (real pages only)
Select up to 10 internal links (pointing TO parent calculators/guides/decisions)
Select up to 3 position-boost edits (real pages only)
Audit thin tool/scenario pages (audit only — no SEO improvements)
Check outreach pipeline (no sending unless scheduled)
prohibited_always: CTR/title/meta improvements on /tools/ or /scenario/ variant pages
Internal links pointing TO thin tool/scenario variants
Using cached GSC data as live
Using corrected/multiplied GSC KPIs as official
Noindex/canonical/redirect/delete without Auditor + Technical Guardian approval
Google Indexing API (disabled for normal pages)
